ground_truth_policy: Rendered page image is annotation ground truth; verified TOC spine supplies routing evidence only.
reviewer_questions: Confirm the visible section heading(s) match the verified TOC target(s); do not re-annotate the TOC page.
Separate running headers, footers, printed page numbers, and side boilerplate from body content.
Mark glossary/acronym term labels separately from descriptive definitions.
